---
title: "Program"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="program-intro">
  Two days. Mornings are shared — everyone in the same room. Afternoons open into parallel sessions where you choose your own path. Each day closes with something that makes the learning stick.
</div>

<!-- DAY ONE -->
<div class="prog-day">
  <div class="prog-day-label">
    <div class="prog-day-number">01</div>
    <div class="prog-day-name">Day One</div>
  </div>
  <div class="prog-day-sessions">

    <div class="prog-item type-admin">
      <div class="prog-time">8:30 – 9:00</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-title">Arrival &amp; Registration</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">Pick up your name badge, grab a coffee, and connect with fellow participants before we begin.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-admin">
      <div class="prog-time">9:00 – 9:30</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-title">Welcome &amp; Opening</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">Formal welcome from C3L, housekeeping, and an overview of how the two days are structured.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-plenary">
      <div class="prog-time">9:30 – 10:30</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-tag">Plenary Talk</div>
        <div class="prog-title">Control, Value, and Emotion: What AI Is Doing to the Learner's Experience</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">AI is quietly reshaping how learners experience control, value, and emotion in their work. Reinhard Pekrun puts control-value theory to work as a measurable lens on AI-mediated learning, with a sharp focus on the methods — how to capture achievement emotions and design studies that reveal whether AI supports or undermines them.</div>
        <div class="prog-speaker">With Reinhard Pekrun</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-break">
      <div class="prog-time">10:30 – 11:00</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-title">Morning Break</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-breakout">
      <div class="prog-time">11:00 – 12:30</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-tag">Breakout — Part I</div>
        <div class="prog-title">Workshop Sessions</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">Choose one of our parallel sessions and go deep. Each 90-minute block is designed to be hands-on, conversational, and directly applicable to your work. You will stay with the same session for Part II after lunch.</div>
        <a class="prog-link" href="sessions.html">See all sessions →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-break">
      <div class="prog-time">12:30 – 2:00</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-title">Lunch</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-breakout">
      <div class="prog-time">2:00 – 3:30</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-tag">Breakout — Part II</div>
        <div class="prog-title">Workshop Sessions (continued)</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">A second 90-minute block with the same session and speakers. Go deeper, work through your questions, and consolidate what you've covered in the morning.</div>
        <a class="prog-link" href="sessions.html">See all sessions →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-break">
      <div class="prog-time">3:30 – 4:00</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-title">Afternoon Break</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-closing">
      <div class="prog-time">4:00 – 6:00</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-tag">Showcase</div>
        <div class="prog-title">Share Your Work, Meet Your Collaborators</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">Bring a slide, a prototype, a finding, or just an idea you're wrestling with. This is your moment to share what you're working on with a generous, curious audience — followed by drinks and open networking.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<!-- DAY TWO -->
<div class="prog-day">
  <div class="prog-day-label">
    <div class="prog-day-number">02</div>
    <div class="prog-day-name">Day Two</div>
  </div>
  <div class="prog-day-sessions">

    <div class="prog-item type-admin">
      <div class="prog-time">8:30 – 9:00</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-title">Arrival &amp; Registration</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">Welcome back. Coffee is on.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-plenary">
      <div class="prog-time">9:00 – 10:30</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-tag">Plenary</div>
        <div class="prog-title">Making Sense of Day One — and Navigating the Funding Landscape</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">We open Day Two with structured reflection on what surfaced yesterday, then shift to one of the most practical questions in academic life: how do you fund the work that matters? Peter Goodyear joins us to share hard-won insight into the ARC landscape — what reviewers actually look for, how to position your work, and where early-career researchers tend to lose points.</div>
        <div class="prog-speaker">with Peter Goodyear</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-break">
      <div class="prog-time">10:30 – 11:00</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-title">Morning Break</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-plenary">
      <div class="prog-time">11:00 – 12:30</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-tag">Open Gallery</div>
        <div class="prog-title">Revisit, Explore, and Go Deeper</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">Yesterday's sessions don't disappear — they come back as a gallery. Each presenter sets up a brief station where you can get a rapid overview of what was covered, ask the questions you didn't get to ask, and make the connections you missed. Move freely, stay as long as you like at each stop.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-break">
      <div class="prog-time">12:30 – 2:00</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-title">Lunch</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-plenary">
      <div class="prog-time">2:00 – 3:30</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-tag">Research Clinic</div>
        <div class="prog-title">Design Your Next Move</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">Bring a half-formed idea — a grant concept, a research design, a school partnership you're trying to shape, or a tool you want to build. Small groups rotate through facilitators who offer structured feedback and help you leave with something concrete: a clearer question, a sharper pitch, or a first draft of a plan.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-break">
      <div class="prog-time">3:30 – 4:00</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-title">Afternoon Break</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="prog-item type-closing">
      <div class="prog-time">4:00 – 5:00</div>
      <div class="prog-body">
        <div class="prog-tag">Closing</div>
        <div class="prog-title">What We're Building Together</div>
        <div class="prog-desc">We close not with a summary but with a commitment. What collaborations are forming? What follow-up do we need? Participants share intentions, facilitators map connection points, and we sketch what comes next for this community.</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
